message:
✨ Add named favorite lists with full CRUD and channel filter UI (#6)

- Add FavoriteLists and FavoriteListChannels tables (schema v2)
- Add migration strategy for v1→v2
- Add all favorite list DB queries (create/rename/delete/add/remove)
- Update group filter bar: All | ★ Favorites | ★ <list> | groups
- Long-press channel row → bottom sheet to add/remove from lists
- Star icon on favorited channel rows
- Manage Favorites dialog (create/rename/delete/reorder lists)
- Remove unused shared_preferences import and pref constants

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ dependencies:
   collection: ^1.19.1
   path_provider: ^2.1.5
   path: ^1.9.0
-  shared_preferences: ^2.3.5
+  shared_preferences: ^2.5.4
   logger: ^2.5.0
   intl: ^0.19.0
   equatable: ^2.0.7
